hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=str(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')); sys.exit(0) if not os.path.basename(p).endswith('.env') else (sys.stderr.write('BLOCKED by repo hook: '+p+' is a secrets file. Real values belong in the user-managed .env (never written by an agent, never committed); document new variables in oracle/.env.example instead.'), sys.exit(2))"
